description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push events. The workflow has two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux with static analysis. The Windows job runs on a Windows 2019 environment, checks out the repository, clones several plugins, generates and builds a project using genie and MSBuild, and builds the engine with different configurations. The Linux job runs on an Ubuntu 20.04 environment, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, downloads 3rd-party libraries, and performs PVS-Studio static analysis.
